Name: TRIKE_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol wanted help gathering berries.
NestClueText: The nest is covered in crushed berries. Kevin was last seen near Trikes.

Name: STEGO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Stegosaurus spikes are fashionable.Kevin has gone looking for style advice.
NestClueText: The sand around the nest is covered in strange drawings of plates and spikes.Large herbivore tracks lead inland.Kevin was last seen near Stegos.
